howItWorks.intro: This military draft lottery odds calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Base odds = troops needed beyond volunteers / eligible pool × 100
Age-adjusted odds = base × age factor (younger = higher risk)
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Could there be a draft today?
faq.answer: Legally, yes. The Selective Service System still exists and all male US residents ages 18-25 must register. Activating a draft requires an act of Congress and presidential approval. No draft has been activated since 1973.

faq.question: How did the Vietnam draft lottery work?
faq.answer: Each day of the year (1-366) was assigned a random number. Men born on dates with low numbers were called first. In 1970, numbers 1-195 were called. In 1972, only 1-95.

faq.question: Who would be exempt from a draft?
faq.answer: Historical exemptions include: medical conditions, sole surviving son, conscientious objectors (assigned alternative service), and certain critical civilian occupations. College deferments were eliminated in 1971.

faq.question: Is the Military Draft Lottery Odds Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Military Draft Lottery Odds Calculator?
sections.body: The Military Draft Lottery Odds Calculator is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your your age, gender, conflict scenario, you get instant results including your draft probability, eligible pool size, troops needed beyond volunteers. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting your draft probability right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your your age and need to find the right your draft probability. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
